name: Universal BCD Seven-Segment Decoder
description: A multi-standard binary/BCD to seven-segment decoder (decimal, hexadecimal, and vintage calculator fonts), adapted from Tiny Tapeout's Apache-2.0 ubcd (commit b16f134), taken spec -> lint -> simulation -> GDS on sky130hd entirely through the platform.
highlights: Full flow to GDSII on sky130hd (OpenROAD/ORFS)
Timing met: WNS 0.0 ns; 192 std cells; 1232 um^2
Self-checking testbench (BCD 0-9 + hex A-F vs golden font) PASSED
Interactive: open universal_bcd_decoder.dashboard.html to flip through all 8 glyph families live
source_note: RTL adapted from Tiny Tapeout ubcd (Apache-2.0, commit b16f134); one portability edit (always_comb -> always @(*)); original self-checking TB; authored by dogfooding SiliconCrew locally.
